productDisplayName: Puma Women's Script 3/4 Grey Track Pant
description: CompositionGrey capris made of 35% cotton and 65% polyester, with flattened seams, broad elasticated waist  with reinforced fabric that can be folded, two side pockets, reinforced tear points, tapering hemline with broad rimming and brand logo printed on the left legFittingSlimWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Relax and chill out in these comfy dark grey capris from puma. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while you look ravishing in the harem silhouette. These cotton capris stretch and move with your body, offering a comfortable training session. Team it with a yoga t-shirt and fitness shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 37"Height-5'7”, Waist – 26”, Hips – 36”
